name: research-atlas
description: Research Atlas's flagship plugins for AI-assisted academic research. Currently ships the research-verification skill; more skills land post-acceptance-test.

plugins.name: research-verification
plugins.description: End-to-end reference verification: CrossRef + OpenAlex DOI resolution, metadata cross-check, no-DOI search fallback, and a structured per-reference verdict envelope. 30-reference acceptance corpus bundled.
